general.name: Zoom Auto Allow Notifications
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>2B35EA16-063A-446C-AEAF-6372DAC263A6</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>2B35EA16-063A-446C-AEAF-6372DAC263A6</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Zoom Auto Allow Notifications</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>746C9C19-6135-4515-9EE5-CE2FAF5549EF</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>746C9C19-6135-4515-9EE5-CE2FAF5549EF</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>com.apple.notificationsettings</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>NotificationSettings</key><array><dict><key>AlertType</key><integer>1</integer><key>BadgesEnabled</key><true/><key>BundleIdentifier</key><string>us.zoom.xos</string><key>CriticalAlertEnabled</key><false/><key>NotificationsEnabled</key><true/><key>ShowInLockScreen</key><true/><key>ShowInNotificationCenter</key><true/><key>SoundsEnabled</key><true/></dict><dict><key>AlertType</key><integer>1</integer><key>BadgesEnabled</key><true/><key>BundleIdentifier</key><string>com.jamfsoftware.Management-Action</string><key>CriticalAlertEnabled</key><false/><key>NotificationsEnabled</key><true/><key>ShowInLockScreen</key><true/><key>ShowInNotificationCenter</key><true/><key>SoundsEnabled</key><true/></dict></array></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
